# Template Spec

The `SandboxTemplateSpec` defines the complete configuration for a template. This page covers all available options in detail.

## Overview

```json
{
    "displayName": "Python 3.11",
    "description": "Python runtime environment",
    "mainContainer": { ... },
    "sidecars": [ ... ],
    "pool": { ... },
    "lifecycle": { ... },
    "network": { ... },
    "envVars": { ... },
    "pod": { ... },
    "public": false,
    "allowedTeams": ["team-1", "team-2"]
}
```

---

## Main Container

The primary container where your code runs.

### ContainerSpec

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `image` | string | Yes | Container image (e.g., `python:3.11-slim`) |
| `imagePullPolicy` | string | No | Pull policy: `Always`, `IfNotPresent`, `Never` |
| `env` | array | No | Environment variables (array of `EnvVar`) |
| `resources` | object | Yes | CPU and memory limits |
| `securityContext` | object | No | Container security settings |

### ResourceQuota

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `cpu` | string | CPU limit (e.g., `1`, `500m`, `2`) |
| `memory` | string | Memory limit (e.g., `512Mi`, `1Gi`, `2Gi`) |

### EnvVar

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `name` | string | Yes | Variable name |
| `value` | string | Yes | Variable value |

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `mainContainer := &sandbox0.ContainerSpec{
    Image: "python:3.11-slim",
    ImagePullPolicy: sandbox0.NewOptString("IfNotPresent"),
    Env: []sandbox0.EnvVar{
        {Name: "PYTHONUNBUFFERED", Value: "1"},
        {Name: "LOG_LEVEL", Value: "info"},
    },
    Resources: &sandbox0.ResourceQuota{
        Cpu:    sandbox0.NewOptString("1"),
        Memory: sandbox0.NewOptString("512Mi"),
    },
    SecurityContext: &sandbox0.SecurityContext{
        RunAsUser:  sandbox0.NewOptInt64(1000),
        RunAsGroup: sandbox0.NewOptInt64(1000),
    },
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-go"
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `main_container = {
    "image": "python:3.11-slim",
    "imagePullPolicy": "IfNotPresent",
    "env": [
        {"name": "PYTHONUNBUFFERED", "value": "1"},
        {"name": "LOG_LEVEL", "value": "info"},
    ],
    "resources": {
        "cpu": "1",
        "memory": "512Mi",
    },
    "securityContext": {
        "runAsUser": 1000,
        "runAsGroup": 1000,
    },
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-python"
    },
    {
      label: "JavaScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `const mainContainer = {
    image: 'python:3.11-slim',
    imagePullPolicy: 'IfNotPresent',
    env: [
        { name: 'PYTHONUNBUFFERED', value: '1' },
        { name: 'LOG_LEVEL', value: 'info' },
    ],
    resources: {
        cpu: '1',
        memory: '512Mi',
    },
    securityContext: {
        runAsUser: 1000,
        runAsGroup: 1000,
    },
};`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-typescript"
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `s0 template create python-3.11 \\
    --image python:3.11-slim \\
    --cpu 1 --memory 512Mi \\
    --env PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \\
    --env LOG_LEVEL=info`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-cli",
      setup: ["command -v s0 >/dev/null"]
    }
  ]}
/>

---

## Sidecars

Sidecars are additional containers that run alongside the main container in the same sandbox. Common use cases include:

- Logging agents
- Monitoring proxies
- Service meshes
- Local databases

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `sidecars := []sandbox0.ContainerSpec{
    {
        Image: "busybox:latest",
        Resources: &sandbox0.ResourceQuota{
            Cpu:    sandbox0.NewOptString("100m"),
            Memory: sandbox0.NewOptString("64Mi"),
        },
    },
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-go"
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `sidecars = [
    {
        "image": "busybox:latest",
        "resources": {
            "cpu": "100m",
            "memory": "64Mi",
        },
    },
],
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-python"
    },
    {
      label: "JavaScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `const sidecars = [
    {
        image: 'busybox:latest',
        resources: {
            cpu: '100m',
            memory: '64Mi',
        },
    },
];`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-typescript"
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `# Sidecars currently require API or SDK usage
# CLI support coming soon`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-cli"
    }
  ]}
/>

---

## Pool Configuration

Pool settings control the pre-warmed sandbox pool for fast startup.

### PoolStrategy

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `minIdle` | integer | Yes | Minimum number of idle (pre-warmed) sandboxes |
| `maxIdle` | integer | Yes | Maximum number of idle sandboxes |
| `autoScale` | boolean | Yes | Enable automatic pool scaling |

<Callout variant="info">
Higher <code>minIdle</code> values provide faster response times but consume more resources. Start with <code>minIdle: 1</code> and adjust based on your traffic patterns.
</Callout>

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `pool := &sandbox0.PoolStrategy{
    MinIdle:   2,     // Always keep 2 sandboxes ready
    MaxIdle:   10,    // Scale up to 10 idle sandboxes
    AutoScale: true,  // Automatically adjust based on demand
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-go"
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `pool = {
    "minIdle": 2,     # Always keep 2 sandboxes ready
    "maxIdle": 10,    # Scale up to 10 idle sandboxes
    "autoScale": True,  # Automatically adjust based on demand
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-python"
    },
    {
      label: "JavaScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `const pool = {
    minIdle: 2,     // Always keep 2 sandboxes ready
    maxIdle: 10,    // Scale up to 10 idle sandboxes
    autoScale: true,  // Automatically adjust based on demand
};`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-typescript"
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `s0 template create my-template \\
    --min-idle 2 \\
    --max-idle 10 \\
    --auto-scale`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-cli",
      setup: ["command -v s0 >/dev/null"]
    }
  ]}
/>

---

## Lifecycle Policy

Control sandbox lifetime and cleanup behavior.

### LifecyclePolicy

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `defaultTTL` | integer | Default time-to-live in seconds |
| `maxTTL` | integer | Maximum TTL (cannot be extended beyond this) |
| `idleTimeout` | integer | Idle timeout before auto-pause (seconds) |
| `preStop` | object | Pre-stop hook configuration |

### PreStopHook

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `command` | array | Command to execute before stopping |
| `timeoutSeconds` | integer | Hook execution timeout |

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `lifecycle := &sandbox0.LifecyclePolicy{
    DefaultTTL:  sandbox0.NewOptInt32(3600),   // 1 hour default
    MaxTTL:      sandbox0.NewOptInt32(86400),  // 24 hour maximum
    IdleTimeout: sandbox0.NewOptInt32(300),    // Pause after 5 min idle
    PreStop: &sandbox0.PreStopHook{
        Command: []string{"/bin/sh", "-c", "cleanup.sh"},
        TimeoutSeconds: sandbox0.NewOptInt32(30),
    },
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-go"
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `lifecycle = {
    "defaultTTL": 3600,   # 1 hour default
    "maxTTL": 86400,      # 24 hour maximum
    "idleTimeout": 300,   # Pause after 5 min idle
    "preStop": {
        "command": ["/bin/sh", "-c", "cleanup.sh"],
        "timeoutSeconds": 30,
    },
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-python"
    },
    {
      label: "JavaScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `const lifecycle = {
    defaultTtl: 3600,   // 1 hour default
    maxTtl: 86400,      // 24 hour maximum
    idleTimeout: 300,   // Pause after 5 min idle
    preStop: {
        command: ['/bin/sh', '-c', 'cleanup.sh'],
        timeoutSeconds: 30,
    },
};`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-typescript"
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `s0 template create my-template \\
    --default-ttl 3600 \\
    --max-ttl 86400 \\
    --idle-timeout 300`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-cli",
      setup: ["command -v s0 >/dev/null"]
    }
  ]}
/>

---

## Network Policy

Configure default network access for sandboxes created from this template.

### TplSandboxNetworkPolicy

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `mode` | string | Yes | Network mode: `allow-all` or `block-all` |
| `egress` | object | No | Egress rules for custom mode |

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `// Allow all network access
network := &sandbox0.TplSandboxNetworkPolicy{
    Mode: sandbox0.AllowAll,
}

// Block all network access
network := &sandbox0.TplSandboxNetworkPolicy{
    Mode: sandbox0.BlockAll,
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-go"
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `# Allow all network access
network = {
    "mode": "allow-all",
}

# Block all network access
network = {
    "mode": "block-all",
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-python"
    },
    {
      label: "JavaScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `// Allow all network access
const network = {
    mode: 'allow-all',
};

// Block all network access
const network = {
    mode: 'block-all',
};`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-typescript"
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `# Allow all network access
s0 template create my-template --network-mode allow-all

# Block all network access
s0 template create my-template --network-mode block-all`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-cli",
      setup: ["command -v s0 >/dev/null"]
    }
  ]}
/>

<Callout variant="info">
Network policy can be overridden at sandbox claim time. See [Network Policy](/docs/sandbox/network) for details on egress rules.
</Callout>

---

## Environment Variables

Define default environment variables for all sandboxes.

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `envVars := map[string]string{
    "APP_ENV":     "production",
    "LOG_LEVEL":   "info",
    "CACHE_TTL":   "300",
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-go"
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `env_vars = {
    "APP_ENV": "production",
    "LOG_LEVEL": "info",
    "CACHE_TTL": "300",
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-python"
    },
    {
      label: "JavaScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `const envVars = {
    APP_ENV: 'production',
    LOG_LEVEL: 'info',
    CACHE_TTL: '300',
};`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-typescript"
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `s0 template create my-template \\
    --env APP_ENV=production \\
    --env LOG_LEVEL=info \\
    --env CACHE_TTL=300`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-cli",
      setup: ["command -v s0 >/dev/null"]
    }
  ]}
/>

## Pod Overrides

Advanced Kubernetes pod configuration options.

### PodSpecOverride

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `nodeSelector` | object | Node selection labels |
| `affinity` | object | Node/pod affinity rules |
| `tolerations` | array | Node tolerations |
| `serviceAccountName` | string | Service account to use |

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `pod := &sandbox0.PodSpecOverride{
    NodeSelector: map[string]string{
        "node-type": "compute-optimized",
    },
    ServiceAccountName: sandbox0.NewOptString("sandbox-sa"),
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-go"
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `pod = {
    "nodeSelector": {
        "node-type": "compute-optimized",
    },
    "serviceAccountName": "sandbox-sa",
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-python"
    },
    {
      label: "JavaScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `const pod = {
    nodeSelector: {
        'node-type': 'compute-optimized',
    },
    serviceAccountName: 'sandbox-sa',
};`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-typescript"
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `# Pod overrides currently require API or SDK usage
# CLI support coming soon`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-cli"
    }
  ]}
/>

---

## Visibility & Access Control

Control who can see and use your templates.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `public` | boolean | Make template visible to all teams |
| `allowedTeams` | array | Teams allowed to use this template (if not public) |

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `// Public template - visible to all teams
spec := &sandbox0.SandboxTemplateSpec{
    // ...
    Public: sandbox0.NewOptBool(true),
}

// Private template - restricted to specific teams
spec := &sandbox0.SandboxTemplateSpec{
    // ...
    Public: sandbox0.NewOptBool(false),
    AllowedTeams: []string{"team-alpha", "team-beta"},
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-go"
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `# Public template - visible to all teams
spec = {
    # ...
    "public": True,
}

# Private template - restricted to specific teams
spec = {
    # ...
    "public": False,
    "allowedTeams": ["team-alpha", "team-beta"],
}`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-python"
    },
    {
      label: "JavaScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `// Public template - visible to all teams
const spec = {
    // ...
    public: true,
};

// Private template - restricted to specific teams
const spec = {
    // ...
    public: false,
    allowedTeams: ['team-alpha', 'team-beta'],
};`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-typescript"
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `# Public template
s0 template create my-template --public

# Private template with team access
s0 template create my-template \\
    --private \\
    --allowed-teams team-alpha,team-beta`,
      mode: "run",
      needs: "none",
      session: "template-spec-cli",
      setup: ["command -v s0 >/dev/null"]
    }
  ]}
/>

---

## Advanced Options

### Runtime Class

Specify a custom runtime class for the sandbox pods.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `runtimeClassName` | string | Kubernetes runtime class name |

### Cluster ID

Pin the template to a specific cluster (multi-cluster deployments only).

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `clusterId` | string | Target cluster identifier |

---

## Best Practices

### Resource Sizing

- Start with conservative resource limits and scale up as needed
- Monitor actual usage to optimize allocations
- Consider sidecar resource requirements separately

### Pool Configuration

- Set `minIdle` based on expected burst traffic
- Enable `autoScale` for variable workloads
- Monitor pool metrics to tune `maxIdle`

### Lifecycle Management

- Set `maxTTL` to prevent runaway sandbox costs
- Use `idleTimeout` for auto-pausing inactive sandboxes
- Implement `preStop` hooks for graceful cleanup

### Security

- Use specific image tags instead of `latest`
- Apply `securityContext` to run as non-root
- Restrict network access with `block-all` by default

---
